projectDescription: A professional Vue 2.x tree component with polished animations, drag-and-drop sorting, async lazy loading, filtering, dark mode, and a declarative API — zero external runtime dependencies.
keyFeatures: Single and multi-select with checkbox support
Async lazy loading with loading state
Custom filter/search with highlight and auto-expand
Dark mode via CSS Variables and data-xca-theme
publicApiSurface: props: options, optionValueKey, optionTextKey, optionChildrenKey, optionIconKey, optionDisabledKey, optionDisabledText, optionChildrenFetcher, isLazy, isChildrenEmptyOptionExpandable, draggable, optionMatcher, expandOnFilter, selectedValues, value, multiple, disabledOptionSelectable, showToolbar, objectName, links, toolbarOptions, optionLinks, defaultExpandAll, indentSize, placeholder, loadingText, folderIcon, folderOpenIcon, fileIcon, loadingIcon
events: change, sortchange, expand, collapse, nodeclick, optionchange, linkclick

methods: setSelectedOptionValues(), getSelectedValues(), getSelectedOptions(), getOptions(), updateOptions(), getShowingOptions(), updateOption(), addOption(), removeOption(), filterOptions(), locateCurrent(), expandAll(), expandNode(), collapseAll(), setActiveValue()
types: OptionItem, OptionValueResolver, OptionTextResolver, OptionChildrenFetcher, OptionMatcher, OptionLink, Link, ToolbarOption, OptionChangeData
